summary: Tested flags_only mode duel questions. Fix INCOMPLETE: force_image param is only applied in the /rooms/powerup 'skip' handler (line 560), but NOT in the primary duel initiator /rooms/attack (line 415). Sampling 25 flags_only duels resulted in only 12% having an 'img' field (3/25), not 100%. Classic mode correctly returns 0% images in this sample (still within probability).
passed: Classic mode duels do not force images (0/20 in sample)

failed.issue: get_random_question() called WITHOUT force_image param when mode==flags_only. As a result, primary attack duels use the 25%/15%/20% probability logic and mostly return text questions (capitals) instead of flag images.
failed.evidence: Sampled 25 fresh flags_only rooms -> attack -> duel.question. Only 3/25 (12.0%) had 'img' field pointing to flagcdn.com. Examples of text-only questions returned: 'عاصمة البرازيل؟', 'عاصمة إيطاليا؟', 'أي هذه الأعلام هو علم الجزائر؟' (this is a text-choice flag question without img). Expected: 100% with img=https://flagcdn.com/...

action_items: In /app/backend/server.py line 415, change `question = get_random_question(category, game.get('custom_questions'))` to `question = get_random_function(category, game.get('custom_questions'), force_image=(game.get('mode') == 'flags_only'))` (same pattern already applied at line 560).
After fix, re-sample flags_only duels to confirm 100% of question objects contain an 'img' field.
